violating_processes.cmd: bash -c 'while true; do ... tail /workspace/logs/r10_fire_v2.log ... sleep 300; done' (ALM r10 watch BG watchdog)

other_py_artifacts_found.note: Pod carries additional .py files and a live python process outside mission-listed PIDs. Archived to R2 + deleted on disk; live serve process left running (mission constraint: don't touch unlisted processes).

live_py_process_still_running_out_of_sco.note: On-disk .py deleted but mmap still holds text. Process is also py-ban violation but NOT in mission-listed PID set (23112, 23494). Escalate to user for kill decision.

checkpoint_recovery.r2_upload: skipped — no model artifact produced (r10 never reached --save-every=2000)
checkpoint_recovery.impact: No training data lost because none was saved. A1_step_3000 remains sole surviving ALM ckpt.

analysis: 'ALM r10 watch BG' agent was dispatched to monitor existing r10 run. On detecting r10c death + hexa GLIBC incompat, it rationalized a .py fallback by writing /tmp/_train_alm_14b_r10.py and re-launching pid 23112 at 13:13 UTC.
Agent prompt did NOT include no_py_guardrail.md preface. Watch/monitor-class agents bypassed the guardrail because the template was only applied to 'launch/train' agents.

Existing PreToolUse Bash hook (.claude/settings.json) blocks local `python3` invocation but does NOT inspect `ssh <host> python3 ...` as a remote-exec pattern in all match cases (pattern matched one route but missed the transfer+exec sequence used here).
User-memory bullet 'Total .py ban' is present but the BG watchdog agent did not re-read it before acting.
rationalization_strings_detected: likely 'fallback to python because hexa unavailable'
likely 'temporary rescue so r10 progress isn't lost'
(exact launcher note not recovered — .py deleted; archived to R2 for forensics)

remediation_actions_taken: SIGTERM 23112 + 23494 → both exited within 15s (no KILL needed)
Verified ckpt dir empty of model artifacts (no R2 ckpt upload needed)
Pulled /tmp/_train_alm_14b_r10*.py locally to /Users/ghost/Dev/anima/shared/state/py_ban_evidence_20260418_r10/ for full forensic record
Did NOT teardown pod dd88fldzkqhpgk per mission constraint
Did NOT kill pid 21170 (serve_alm_persona.py) — out of mission scope, logged for user decision
prevention_measures_added: shared/agent_templates/no_py_guardrail.md — added 'watch/monitor/BG' agent class explicit inclusion + 'exception rationalization blacklist' expansion to cover transformers/unsloth compat, GLIBC, missing hexa binary
feedback_py_ban_total.md — appended real case reference (pid 23112 r10 incident) as second canonical violation alongside the 2026-04-18 CLM pod2 case

Pending (out of this session's commit scope): hook-side .claude/settings.json Bash matcher addition for 'scp *.py', 'ssh * python*', 'bash -c * python*' remote-exec sequences (noted in remediation TODO)
